headline: Eastman Chemical: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
summary: KINGSPORT, Tenn. — KINGSPORT, Tenn. — Eastman Chemical Co. on Thursday reported first-quarter earnings of $107 million. The Kingsport, Tennessee-based company said it had profit of 93 cents...
